prompts.label: Cadillac F1 — paddock
prompts.text: Use the FIRST input photo as the source person. Preserve their exact face, facial features, skin tone, hair and overall likeness — the result MUST be clearly recognizable as the SAME individual from the input photo. Place this exact person in the Cadillac Formula 1 team paddock: dress them in a Cadillac F1 racing suit with subtle team branding, garage lighting, F1 cars and pit-lane atmosphere in the background. Keep their head, face and expression intact; only change clothing, hairstyle styling consistent with a race driver, and background. Cinematic, photorealistic, sharp focus, high quality. Do NOT replace the person with a generic model or a different face.

prompts.label: Cadillac F1 — night city
prompts.text: Use the FIRST input photo as the source person. Preserve their exact face, facial features, skin tone, hair and overall likeness — the result MUST be clearly recognizable as the SAME individual from the input photo. Place this exact person in a dramatic night urban scene with neon reflections, wet asphalt and premium automotive racing mood inspired by the Cadillac F1 team. Keep their head, face and expression intact; only change clothing (modern racing-inspired jacket) and background. Cinematic, photorealistic, sharp focus, high quality. Do NOT replace the person with a generic model or a different face.
